mapper.sql: fht.id, fht.created_time, fht.created_timestamp, fht.created_by, fht.modified_time, fht.modified_timestamp, fht.modified_by, fht.version, fht.code, fht.name, fht.type, fht.status, fht.take_time, fht.instance_id, fhi.name as instance_name, fhi.biz_number, fht.model_id, fm.name as model_name, fm.code as model_code
